mnemonics: FACTS: For A Clear Time Series - Frequency, Amplitude, Cycles, and Time define the Spectrum.
keyPoints: The spectral density function decomposes a stationary time series into its constituent frequency components.
A peak in the spectrum indicates a strong periodic component (cycle) at that specific frequency.
The spectrum and the autocovariance function form a Fourier transform pair, offering two equivalent views of the process's memory.
commonMistakes: Assuming a process is white noise (flat spectrum) without testing, when it may have hidden cycles.
Misinterpreting a peak in the sample periodogram as a true cycle without checking its statistical significance against the noise.
